title: 100 Person Outdoor Wedding Bundle - 100 Resin Folding Chairs, 12 Banquet Tables
features: Create a stunning outdoor wedding with our 100 Person Bundle, featuring 100 Resin Folding Chairs and 12 Banquet Tables.
This elegant and durable set ensures a beautiful and seamless event setup.
Buy all of your outdoor wedding equipment with one purchase!
This product bundle includes 100 of our Commercial Grade resin folding chairs as well as your choice of 12 folding tables.
Choose the chair color: white, black, or mahogany.
Then, choose what table works best for you: 8'x30" plastic or wood folding banquet tables, or 60" round wood or plastic folding tables.
You cannot combine round and banquet folding tables.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping, Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k
